---
name: Slice
about: Small implementation or spec slice under a milestone initiative
title: "Slice: "
labels: ""
assignees: ""
---

## Parent

- [ ] Link the initiative issue

## Canonical Spec

- [ ] Link the relevant doc in `docs/`

## Milestone

- [ ] Set the GitHub milestone

## Workflow State

- [ ] Add `ready` when this slice is eligible for auto-pick

## Type

- [ ] `feature`
- [ ] `bug`
- [ ] `test`

## Scope

What exactly should happen in this slice?

## Out of Scope

What should not be touched in this slice?

## Acceptance Criteria

- [ ] Concrete behavior or doc outcome
- [ ] Concrete test or verification outcome

## Tests

- [ ] `cargo test`
- [ ] scenario or manual verification if needed

List exact commands here before closing the issue.

## Handoff Notes

Use short factual comments in this format:

```md
## <AgentName>
- Changed:
- Tests:
- Open:
- State:
- Next:
```
